Resource Profile: Task

Official URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Task Version: 1.0.0
Active as of 2024-07-26 Computable Name: Task

Copyright/Legal: Varian Medical Systems, Inc.

Task resource represents tasks configured in ARIA.

A task resource describes an activity that can be performed and tracks the state of completion of that activity. It is a representation that an activity should be or has been initiated, and eventually, represents the successful or unsuccessful completion of that activity.

Usage:

  • Examples for this Resource Profile: Task/Task-441

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Differential Table
  • Key Elements Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

This structure is derived from Task

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Task C0..*TaskA task to be performed
task-status: Only the following status values are supported for Appointment from ARIA: draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
task-priority: Only the following priority values are supported for Task from ARIA: routine | urgent | asap
id 1..1idTask unique Id. Its format is 'Task-' + ResourceSer.
meta
versionId S0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated S0..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
task-minutesDuration 0..1QuantityMinutes Duration (Time Frame) estimate required to perform task.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/task-minutesDuration
reminderTime 0..1QuantityDuration prior to scheduled time before which a reminder should be notified.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/reminderTime
supporting-information 0..1Quantitysupporting information required to perform task.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/supporting-information
Slices for modifierExtension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension:readOnly 0..1ReadOnlyreadOnly Flag
identifier 0..*IdentifierTask Instance Identifier. 1. UID
instantiatesCanonical 0..1canonical(ActivityDefinition)Not Supported.
instantiatesUri 0..1uriNot Supported.
basedOn 0..*Reference(Resource)Parent Appointment i.e. Request fulfilled by this task.
groupIdentifier 0..1IdentifierNot Supported.
partOf 0..*Reference(Task)Not Supported.
status 1..1codeTask Status e.g. draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
statusReason 0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
businessStatus 0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
intent 1..1codeorder
Fixed Value: order
priority 0..1coderoutine | urgent | asap
code 0..1CodeableConceptActivity Category Code
description 0..1stringNot Supported.
focus 0..1Reference(Resource)What task is acting on. i.e. Reference to Activity Definition.
for 0..1Reference(Resource)Beneficiary of the Task i.e. Patient
encounter 0..1Reference(Encounter)Not Supported.
executionPeriod 0..1PeriodEnd time is mapped to Due date.
requester 0..1Reference(Device | Organization | Patient | Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Task created by
performerType 0..*CodeableConceptNot Supported.
owner 0..1Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Responsible individual like Practitioner.
location 0..1Reference(Location)Not Supported.
reasonCode 0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
reasonReference 0..1Reference(Resource)Not Supported.
insurance 0..*Reference(Coverage | ClaimResponse)Not Supported.
note 0..*AnnotationComments made about the task
relevantHistory 0..*Reference(Provenance)Not Supported.
restriction
repetitions 0..1positiveIntNot Supported.
period 0..1PeriodWhen fulfillment sought
end 0..1dateTimeEnd time with inclusive boundary, if not ongoing
input 0..*BackboneElementNot Supported.
output 0..*BackboneElementNot Supported.

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
task-priorityerrorTaskOnly the following priority values are supported for Task from ARIA: routine | urgent | asap
: priority = 'routine' or priority = 'urgent' or priority = 'asap'
task-statuserrorTaskOnly the following status values are supported for Appointment from ARIA: draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
: status = 'draft' or status = 'ready' or status = 'in-progress' or status = 'completed' or status = 'entered-in-error' or status = 'cancelled'

Task C0..*TaskA task to be performed
task-status: Only the following status values are supported for Appointment from ARIA: draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
task-priority: Only the following priority values are supported for Task from ARIA: routine | urgent | asap

Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
task-minutesDuration 0..1QuantityMinutes Duration (Time Frame) estimate required to perform task.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/task-minutesDuration
reminderTime 0..1QuantityDuration prior to scheduled time before which a reminder should be notified.
URL: http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/reminderTime

Slices for modifierExtension ?!0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension:readOnly ?!0..1ReadOnlyreadOnly Flag
identifier 0..*IdentifierTask Instance Identifier. 1. UID
instantiatesCanonical Σ0..1canonical(ActivityDefinition)Not Supported.
instantiatesUri Σ0..1uriNot Supported.
basedOn Σ0..*Reference(Resource)Parent Appointment i.e. Request fulfilled by this task.
groupIdentifier Σ0..1IdentifierNot Supported.
partOf Σ0..*Reference(Task)Not Supported.
status ?!Σ1..1codeTask Status e.g. draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
Binding: TaskStatus (required): The current status of the task.

statusReason Σ0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): Codes to identify the reason for current status. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.

businessStatus Σ0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): The domain-specific business-contextual sub-state of the task. For example: "Blood drawn", "IV inserted", "Awaiting physician signature", etc.

intent Σ1..1codeorder
Binding: TaskIntent (required): Distinguishes whether the task is a proposal, plan or full order.


Fixed Value: order
priority 0..1coderoutine | urgent | asap
Binding: RequestPriority (required): The task's priority.

code Σ0..1CodeableConceptActivity Category Code
Binding: TaskCode (example): Codes to identify what the task involves. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.

description Σ0..1stringNot Supported.
focus Σ0..1Reference(Resource)What task is acting on. i.e. Reference to Activity Definition.
for Σ0..1Reference(Resource)Beneficiary of the Task i.e. Patient
encounter Σ0..1Reference(Encounter)Not Supported.
executionPeriod Σ0..1PeriodEnd time is mapped to Due date.
requester Σ0..1Reference(Device | Organization | Patient | Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Task created by
performerType 0..*CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (preferred): The type(s) of task performers allowed.


owner Σ0..1Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Responsible individual like Practitioner.
location Σ0..1Reference(Location)Not Supported.
reasonCode 0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): Indicates why the task is needed. E.g. Suspended because patient admitted to hospital.

reasonReference 0..1Reference(Resource)Not Supported.
insurance 0..*Reference(Coverage | ClaimResponse)Not Supported.
note 0..*AnnotationComments made about the task
relevantHistory 0..*Reference(Provenance)Not Supported.
input 0..*BackboneElementNot Supported.
modifierExtension ?!Σ0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type 1..1CodeableConceptLabel for the input
Binding: (unbound) (example): Codes to identify types of input parameters. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow. E.g. "Comparison source", "Applicable consent", "Concomitent Medications", etc.

value[x] 1..1Content to use in performing the task

This structure is derived from Task

Summary

Mandatory: 1 element
Must-Support: 2 elements
Fixed Value: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • Device (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Device)
  • Organization (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Organization)
  • Patient (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Patient)
  • Practitioner (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Practitioner)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/task-minutesDuration
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/reminderTime
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/supporting-information
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/readOnly (Modifier)

Binding: TaskStatus (required): The current status of the task.

statusReason Σ0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): Codes to identify the reason for current status. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.

businessStatus Σ0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): The domain-specific business-contextual sub-state of the task. For example: "Blood drawn", "IV inserted", "Awaiting physician signature", etc.

intent Σ1..1codeorder
Binding: TaskIntent (required): Distinguishes whether the task is a proposal, plan or full order.


Fixed Value: order
priority 0..1coderoutine | urgent | asap
Binding: RequestPriority (required): The task's priority.

code Σ0..1CodeableConceptActivity Category Code
Binding: TaskCode (example): Codes to identify what the task involves. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.

description Σ0..1stringNot Supported.
focus Σ0..1Reference(Resource)What task is acting on. i.e. Reference to Activity Definition.
for Σ0..1Reference(Resource)Beneficiary of the Task i.e. Patient
encounter Σ0..1Reference(Encounter)Not Supported.
executionPeriod Σ0..1PeriodEnd time is mapped to Due date.
requester Σ0..1Reference(Device | Organization | Patient | Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Task created by
performerType 0..*CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (preferred): The type(s) of task performers allowed.


owner Σ0..1Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole)Responsible individual like Practitioner.
location Σ0..1Reference(Location)Not Supported.
reasonCode 0..1CodeableConceptNot Supported.
Binding: (unbound) (example): Indicates why the task is needed. E.g. Suspended because patient admitted to hospital.

reasonReference 0..1Reference(Resource)Not Supported.
insurance 0..*Reference(Coverage | ClaimResponse)Not Supported.
note 0..*AnnotationComments made about the task
relevantHistory 0..*Reference(Provenance)Not Supported.
input 0..*BackboneElementNot Supported.
modifierExtension ?!Σ0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type 1..1CodeableConceptLabel for the input
Binding: (unbound) (example): Codes to identify types of input parameters. These will typically be specific to a particular workflow. E.g. "Comparison source", "Applicable consent", "Concomitent Medications", etc.

value[x] 1..1Content to use in performing the task

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Task C0..*TaskA task to be performed
task-status: Only the following status values are supported for Appointment from ARIA: draft |ready | in-progress | completed | entered-in-error | cancelled
task-priority: Only the following priority values are supported for Task from ARIA: routine | urgent | asap
id Σ1..1idTask unique Id. Its format is 'Task-' + ResourceSer.

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

security Σ0..*CodingSecurity Labels applied to this resource

tag Σ0..*CodingTags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".


implicitRules ?!Σ0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

This structure is derived from Task

Summary

Mandatory: 1 element
Must-Support: 2 elements
Fixed Value: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • Device (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Device)
  • Organization (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Organization)
  • Patient (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Patient)
  • Practitioner (http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/Practitioner)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/task-minutesDuration
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/reminderTime
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/supporting-information
  • http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/readOnly (Modifier)
